title: Kemal Özkırşehirli
description: Academic homepage for Kemal Özkırşehirli: AI/ML for science, physics, computational chemistry, geometric deep learning, CADD, protein design, chromatin biology, statistical mechanics, and scientific workflow engineering.

author.name: Kemal Özkırşehirli
author.role: MIT B.Sc. candidate · Computer Science and Engineering · Physics · Applied Mathematics
author.bio: I work at the intersection of AI/ML, physics, computational chemistry, molecular simulation, CADD, protein and genome modeling, geometric deep learning, statistical mechanics, and scientific workflow engineering. My goal is to turn difficult scientific systems into computable representations, testable algorithms, and decision-making tools for discovery.
highlights: MIT B.Sc. candidate, expected May 2027; GPA 5.0/5.0; Computer Science and Engineering, Physics, and Applied Mathematics; minors in Philosophy and Writing; transferred from Columbia University.

Current work spans 3D mesh learning for life sciences, ChromoGen-V2, autoimmune V2M-Engine, PRISM protein-model red-teaming, EVEdesign, TBXT CADD, ChemAgent-QSM, antibody RL, and ML-augmented renormalization group theory.
Research and engineering across MIT CSAIL, MIT Chemistry, A*STAR EDDC, W2D2/PRISM, Harvard Medical School, Columbia, AI@MIT, Pedal AI, Weizmann Institute, and MIT Physics.

Bronze medalist at IChO and IMChO; Columbia Science Research Fellow and Likely Letter recipient; TÜBİTAK National Chemistry Olympiad silver medalist; Waterloo distinction and AIME recognition recipient; YC Startup School 2026 accepted.

items.title: EVEdesign
items.description: 21-person, 18-institution, 8-country protein-design collaboration; uncertainty-aware multi-objective candidate selection [code pending release]

items.title: Antibody RL
items.description: structure-informed cross-attention transformer and PPO pipeline with OAS/SAbDab/IEDB data and AF-Multimer/IGFold-style metrics

items.title: TBXT
items.description: 11-person chordoma/TBXT sprint; docking, QSAR, CNN rescoring, BRICS generation, filtering, and public research release

items.title: V2M
items.description: autoimmune genetics-to-mechanism target-discovery engine with single-cell foundation models, QTL/colocalization, and targetability checks [code pending release]

items.title: Pedal AI
items.description: LangGraph/FastAPI chemistry agents, retrosynthesis route trees, <50ms latency, 15,000+ daily API requests, 100,000+ molecular predictions [code pending release]

items.title: ChromoGen V2
items.description: conditional diffusion for small-molecule-perturbed single-cell 3D chromatin ensembles with Plate-C/Easy Dip-C/CHARM-style data [code pending release]

items.title: Biochemical Diffusion
items.description: PINN/neural-ODE stochastic simulation of nonequilibrium reaction-diffusion networks; Euler-Maruyama, Runge-Kutta, Gillespie SSA [code pending release]

items.title: Sequence-to-State
items.description: variant-effect scoring, Perturb-seq validation, counterfactual immune-state transport, and structure-aware target prioritization [code pending release]

items.title: ChemAgent-QSM
items.description: LLM-guided quantum/statistical-mechanics pipelines using PySCF; TCFs, local order, relaxation, mobility, spectra

items.title: Renormalization Group
items.description: GNN/PyTorch Kadanoff RG framework for spin systems, fixed points, and phase boundaries [code pending release]

items.title: DFT → kMC
items.description: multi-scale computational organic chemistry pipeline; 20+ transition states, 500+ trajectories, 22% predicted yield optimization [code pending release]
